# Deutschland-Simulator – Fachliche Dokumentation
Language: German
Status: fachliche Modell- und Forschungsdokumentation, version 0.10
Start: /index.md
Overview: /00-meta/index.md
Principles: /01-produkt/vision-und-grundsaetze.md

Public spending overview: /02-fiskal/ausgaben-und-leistungen.md

Bürgergeld user interface and scenarios: /02-fiskal/buergergeld-bedienoberflaeche.md
Housing and heating costs (KdU) Berlin 2026: /02-fiskal/kdu-berlin-2026.md
Automatic standard model basis: /03-daten/standard-modellbasis.md
Synthetic population, calibration, weighting and privacy: /03-daten/synthetische-bevoelkerung.md
Effects model: /04-modell/wirkungsmodell.md
Central model level and time horizon: /04-modell/modellstufe-und-zeithorizont.md
Indirect effects: /04-modell/indirekte-und-nichtmonetaere-wirkungen.md

Uncertainty: /04-modell/unsicherheit-und-szenarien.md
Childcare, family and education effects: /05-module/kita-familie-und-bildung.md
Health, sickness and administration effects: /05-module/gesundheit-krankheit-und-buerokratie.md
Demography and age pyramid effects: /05-module/demografie-und-alterspyramide.md
Additional effect modules: /05-module/weitere-wirkungsmodule.md
Evidence: /06-evidenz/evidenzdatenbank.md
Evidence schema: /06-evidenz/evidenzschema.md
Calculation transparency: /06-evidenz/berechnungstransparenz.md
Population, SGB II and model sources: /06-evidenz/quellenregister.md
KdU sources Berlin 2026: /06-evidenz/kdu-quellen-berlin-2026.md
Visualizations: /07-visualisierung/visualisierungen.md
Governance: /09-governance/validierung-governance-ethik.md
Excluded from public documentation: software architecture, worker protocol, IndexedDB stores, internal requirements, design prompts and implementation planning.
